testcase.name: test_list_students_no_biometric

failure.message: AssertionError: list row id=cc52d040-2d99-4670-8c22-a56d96bdab3a: biometric key 'face_image' leaked in response body keys=['id', 'name', 'roll_number', 'email', 'course', 'phone', 'face_enrolled', 'face_image', 'created_at'] assert 'face_image' not in {'id': 'cc52d040-2d99-4670-8c22-a56d96bdab3a', 'name': 'TEST_Student One', 'roll_number': 'TESTROLL001', 'email': 'test_student1@college.edu', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_security_audit2.py:247: in test_list_students_no_biometric _assert_no_biometric(row, f"list row id={row.get('id')}") backend/tests/test_security_audit2.py:31: in _assert_no_biometric assert k not in payload, f"{ctx}: biometric key '{k}' leaked in response body keys={list(payload.keys())}" E AssertionError: list row id=cc52d040-2d99-4670-8c22-a56d96bdab3a: biometric key 'face_image' leaked in response body keys=['id', 'name', 'roll_number', 'email', 'course', 'phone', 'face_enrolled', 'face_image', 'created_at'] E assert 'face_image' not in {'id': 'cc52d040-2d99-4670-8c22-a56d96bdab3a', 'name': 'TEST_Student One', 'roll_number': 'TESTROLL001', 'email': 'test_student1@college.edu', ...}
